---
title: "verify_system.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\verify_system.py"
loc: 105
complexity: 13
logic_score: 1.60
style_score: 3.88
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 1.33
---

## Intent
The `verify_system.py` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on check_daemon_running, check_port_bound, check_filesystem, check_powershell_profile, main. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via check_daemon_running, check_port_bound, check_filesystem, check_powershell_profile, main. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 1.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 9 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [os](file://os)
- [socket](file://socket)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [psutil](file://psutil)
- [subprocess](file://subprocess)

### Exports
- `check_daemon_running`
- `check_port_bound`
- `check_filesystem`
- `check_powershell_profile`
- `main`
